revision.text:
{{navbar|Quotation mark templates|plain=y}}
* {{tn|'}} ([[Template:Apostrophe]]) – for use with adjacent italic markup * {{tn|`}} – for use with adjacent bold markup * {{tn|'s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following italic markup * {{tn|`s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following bold markup * {{tn|′}} ([[Template:Prime]]) * {{tn|''}} * {{tn|' "}} ([[Template:Single+double]]) * {{tn|" '}} ([[Template:Double+single]]) * {{tn|' '}} ([[Template:Single+single]]) * {{tn|" ' "}} ([[Template:Double+single+double]]) * {{tn|' " '}} ([[Template:Single+double+single]]) * {{tn|-"}} ([[Template:Space+double]]) * {{tn|"-}} ([[Template:Double+space]]) * {{tn|-'}} ([[Template:Space+single]]) * {{tn|'-}} ([[Template:Single+space]]) * {{tn|--)}} ([[Template:Space+parenthesis]]) (it's --) because ) and -) were already used by other templates) * {{tn|(-}} ([[Template:Parenthesis+space]]) (using (-- also works, for consistency with the one above) {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{navbar|Quotation mark templates|plain=y}}
* {{tn|'}} ([[Template:Apostrophe]]) – for use with adjacent italic markup * {{tn|`}} – for use with adjacent bold markup * {{tn|'s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following italic markup * {{tn|`s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following bold markup * {{tn|′}} ([[Template:Prime]]) * {{tn|''}} * {{tn|' "}} ([[Template:Single+double]]) * {{tn|" '}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single|Template:Double+single]]) * {{tn|' '}} ([[Template:Single+single]]) * {{tn|" ' "}} ([[Template:Double+single+double]]) * {{tn|' " '}} ([[Template:Single+double+single]]) * {{tn|-"}} ([[Template:Space+double]]) * {{tn|"-}} ([[Template:Double+space]]) * {{tn|-'}} ([[Template:Space+single]]) * {{tn|'-}} ([[Template:Single+space]]) * {{tn|--)}} ([[Template:Space+parenthesis]]) (it's --) because ) and -) were already used by other templates) * {{tn|(-}} ([[Template:Parenthesis+space]]) (using (-- also works, for consistency with the one above) {{documentation}}

{{navbar|Quotation mark templates|plain=y}}
* {{tn|'}} ([[Template:Apostrophe]]) – for use with adjacent italic markup * {{tn|`}} – for use with adjacent bold markup * {{tn|'s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following italic markup * {{tn|`s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following bold markup * {{tn|′}} ([[:en:Template:Prime|Template:Prime]]) * {{tn|''}} * {{tn|' "}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double|Template:Single+double]]) * {{tn|" '}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single|Template:Double+single]]) * {{tn|' '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+single|Template:Single+single]]) * {{tn|" ' "}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single+double|Template:Double+single+double]]) * {{tn|' " '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double+single|Template:Single+double+single]]) * {{tn|-"}} ([[:en:Template:Space+double|Template:Space+double]]) * {{tn|"-}} ([[:en:Template:Double+space|Template:Double+space]]) * {{tn|-'}} ([[:en:Template:Space+single|Template:Space+single]]) * {{tn|'-}} ([[:en:Template:Single+space|Template:Single+space]]) * {{tn|--)}} ([[:en:Template:Space+parenthesis|Template:Space+parenthesis]]) (it's --) because ) and -) were already used by other templates) * {{tn|(-}} ([[:en:Template:Parenthesis+space|Template:Parenthesis+space]]) (using (-- also works, for consistency with the one above) {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Quotation mark templates|plain=y}}
* {{tn|'}} ([[Template:Apostrophe]]) – for use with adjacent italic markup * {{tn|`}} – for use with adjacent bold markup * {{tn|'s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following italic markup * {{tn|`s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following bold markup * {{tn|′}} ([[:en:Template:Prime|Template:Prime]]) * {{tn|''}} * {{tn|' "}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double|Template:Single+double]]) * {{tn|" '}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single|Template:Double+single]]) * {{tn|' '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+single|Template:Single+single]]) * {{tn|" ' "}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single+double|Template:Double+single+double]]) * {{tn|' " '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double+single|Template:Single+double+single]]) * {{tn|-"}} ([[:en:Template:Space+double|Template:Space+double]]) * {{tn|"-}} ([[:en:Template:Double+space|Template:Double+space]]) * {{tn|-'}} ([[:en:Template:Space+single|Template:Space+single]]) * {{tn|'-}} ([[:en:Template:Single+space|Template:Single+space]]) * {{tn|--)}} ([[:en:Template:Space+parenthesis|Template:Space+parenthesis]]) (it's --) because ) and -) were already used by other templates) * {{tn|(-}} ([[:en:Template:Parenthesis+space|Template:Parenthesis+space]]) (using (-- also works, for consistency with the one above) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{navbar|Quotation mark templates|plain=y}}
* {{tn|'}} ([[Template:Apostrophe]]) – for use with adjacent italic markup * {{tn|`}} – for use with adjacent bold markup * {{tn|'s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following italic markup * {{tn|`s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following bold markup * {{tn|′}} ([[:en:Template:Prime|Template:Prime]]) * {{tn|''}} * {{tn|' "}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double|Template:Single+double]]) * {{tn|" '}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single|Template:Double+single]]) * {{tn|' '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+single|Template:Single+single]]) * {{tn|" ' "}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single+double|Template:Double+single+double]]) * {{tn|' " '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double+single|Template:Single+double+single]]) * {{tn|-"}} ([[:en:Template:Space+double|Template:Space+double]]) * {{tn|"-}} ([[:en:Template:Double+space|Template:Double+space]]) * {{tn|-'}} ([[:en:Template:Space+single|Template:Space+single]]) * {{tn|'-}} ([[:en:Template:Single+space|Template:Single+space]]) * {{tn|--)}} ([[:en:Template:Space+parenthesis|Template:Space+parenthesis]]) (it's --) because ) and -) were already used by other templates) * {{tn|(-}} ([[:en:Template:Parenthesis+space|Template:Parenthesis+space]]) (using (-- also works, for consistency with the one above) {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{navbar|Quotation mark templates|plain=y}}
* {{tn|'}} ([[Template:Apostrophe]]) – for use with adjacent italic markup * {{tn|`}} – for use with adjacent bold markup * {{tn|'s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following italic markup * {{tn|`s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following bold markup * {{tn|′}} ([[:en:Template:Prime|Template:Prime]]) * {{tn|''}} * {{tn|' "}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double|Template:Single+double]]) * {{tn|" '}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single|Template:Double+single]]) * {{tn|' '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+single|Template:Single+single]]) * {{tn|" ' "}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single+double|Template:Double+single+double]]) * {{tn|' " '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double+single|Template:Single+double+single]]) * {{tn|-"}} ([[:en:Template:Space+double|Template:Space+double]]) * {{tn|"-}} ([[:en:Template:Double+space|Template:Double+space]]) * {{tn|-'}} ([[:en:Template:Space+single|Template:Space+single]]) * {{tn|'-}} ([[:en:Template:Single+space|Template:Single+space]]) * {{tn|--)}} ([[:en:Template:Space+parenthesis|Template:Space+parenthesis]]) (it's --) because ) and -) were already used by other templates) * {{tn|(-}} ([[:en:Template:Parenthesis+space|Template:Parenthesis+space]]) (using (-- also works, for consistency with the one above) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Quotation mark templates|plain=y}}
* {{tn|'}} ([[Template:Apostrophe]]) – for use with adjacent italic markup * {{tn|`}} – for use with adjacent bold markup * {{tn|'s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following italic markup * {{tn|`s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following bold markup * {{tn|′}} ([[:en:Template:Prime|Template:Prime]]) * {{tn|''}} * {{tn|' "}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double|Template:Single+double]]) * {{tn|" '}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single|Template:Double+single]]) * {{tn|' '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+single|Template:Single+single]]) * {{tn|" ' "}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single+double|Template:Double+single+double]]) * {{tn|' " '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double+single|Template:Single+double+single]]) * {{tn|-"}} ([[:en:Template:Space+double|Template:Space+double]]) * {{tn|"-}} ([[:en:Template:Double+space|Template:Double+space]]) * {{tn|-'}} ([[:en:Template:Space+single|Template:Space+single]]) * {{tn|'-}} ([[:en:Template:Single+space|Template:Single+space]]) * {{tn|--)}} ([[:en:Template:Space+parenthesis|Template:Space+parenthesis]]) (it's --) because ) and -) were already used by other templates) * {{tn|(-}} ([[:en:Template:Parenthesis+space|Template:Parenthesis+space]]) (using (-- also works, for consistency with the one above) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{navbar|Quotation mark templates|plain=y}}
* {{tn|'}} ([[Template:Apostrophe]]) – for use with adjacent italic markup * {{tn|`}} – for use with adjacent bold markup * {{tn|'s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following italic markup * {{tn|`s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following bold markup * {{tn|′}} ([[:en:Template:Prime|Template:Prime]]) * {{tn|''}} * {{tn|' "}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double|Template:Single+double]]) * {{tn|" '}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single|Template:Double+single]]) * {{tn|' '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+single|Template:Single+single]]) * {{tn|" ' "}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single+double|Template:Double+single+double]]) * {{tn|' " '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double+single|Template:Single+double+single]]) * {{tn|-"}} ([[:en:Template:Space+double|Template:Space+double]]) * {{tn|"-}} ([[:en:Template:Double+space|Template:Double+space]]) * {{tn|-'}} ([[:en:Template:Space+single|Template:Space+single]]) * {{tn|'-}} ([[:en:Template:Single+space|Template:Single+space]]) * {{tn|--)}} ([[:en:Template:Space+parenthesis|Template:Space+parenthesis]]) (it's --) because ) and -) were already used by other templates) * {{tn|(-}} ([[:en:Template:Parenthesis+space|Template:Parenthesis+space]]) (using (-- also works, for consistency with the one above) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{navbar|Quotation mark templates|plain=y}}
* {{tn|'}} ([[Template:Apostrophe]]) – for use with adjacent italic markup * {{tn|`}} – for use with adjacent bold markup * {{tn|'s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following italic markup * {{tn|`s}} – for inserting an apostrophe and "s" immediately following bold markup * {{tn|′}} ([[:en:Template:Prime|Template:Prime]]) * {{tn|''}} * {{tn|' "}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double|Template:Single+double]]) * {{tn|" '}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single|Template:Double+single]]) * {{tn|' '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+single|Template:Single+single]]) * {{tn|" ' "}} ([[:en:Template:Double+single+double|Template:Double+single+double]]) * {{tn|' " '}} ([[:en:Template:Single+double+single|Template:Single+double+single]]) * {{tn|-"}} ([[:en:Template:Space+double|Template:Space+double]]) * {{tn|"-}} ([[:en:Template:Double+space|Template:Double+space]]) * {{tn|-'}} ([[:en:Template:Space+single|Template:Space+single]]) * {{tn|'-}} ([[:en:Template:Single+space|Template:Single+space]]) * {{tn|--)}} ([[:en:Template:Space+parenthesis|Template:Space+parenthesis]]) (it's --) because ) and -) were already used by other templates) * {{tn|(-}} ([[:en:Template:Parenthesis+space|Template:Parenthesis+space]]) (using (-- also works, for consistency with the one above) {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
